CustomField.formula: IF( ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Status__c, "Assigned"), IF( ISBLANK(leaseworks__Lease__c), "Assigned - NO LEASE RECORD", TEXT(leaseworks__Status__c) & " - " & TEXT(leaseworks__Lease__r.leaseworks__Lease_Type_Status__c) ), TEXT(leaseworks__Status__c) )
CustomField.label: Current Status
